response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and geospatial experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, which are core requirements; their C++ exposure is limited to academic/thesis work, and their geospatial projects use DLang and Node.js, not the required stack for routing tiling or low-latency navigation data systems.
strengths: Strong open-source geospatial project experience with GISCollective
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and systems
Demonstrated passion for testing, automation, and developer tooling
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or navigation systems
Geospatial work uses DLang/Node.js, not the required C++/Linux pipeline stack
Lacks demonstrated experience with distributed systems, fault tolerance, or real-time traffic integration
